editor.titlePlaceholder: The title, as it will read.
editor.excerptPlaceholder: The excerpt — two lines that invite the reader in.
editor.slugHint: The public URL. You can rename it for free-form posts.

editor.coverHint: Shown exactly as it will appear on the blog.
editor.youtubeHint: If the post has a companion video.
editor.ctaHintLinkNoCopy: There's a link but no button copy — write it if you want the button.
editor.ctaHintBoth: The button will appear at the end of the post.
editor.ctaHintNone: Both empty — the post ends without a button.
editor.bodyPlaceholder: Write here — the text becomes the final page.
editor.bodyHint: markdown — headings, lists, tables, quotes, code and images
editor.previewHint: rendered with the blog's real styles
editor.previewEmptyEs: No Spanish content yet — the page awaits your words.
editor.previewEmptyEn: No English content yet — the Spanish version leads the way.
editor.coverPromptHint: Copy it to generate the cover image with your image generator; this same cover is the Meta OG preview.
editor.saveError: Could not save — please try again.
editor.guardNoCoverBody: This post has no cover image, which is also its Meta (OG) preview. Publish anyway?
